metadata.relation_to_case: Estranged Brother of Dr. Priya Nair

content: I am Dr. Nair’s younger brother. We have not spoken since 2018 due to a family dispute. I have never been to Goa. I do not own any property in India. I was in San Francisco from January 1, 2022, to September 30, 2022, on a work visa. My passport was valid until 2025, but I never traveled to India during that time. I have no bank account in India. I have no knowledge of any transaction involving 'A. Mehta' purchasing property in Goa. I did not receive any money. I was not involved in any way. I only learned about this case from news reports in August 2023.
